response.justification: Candidate is an experienced senior full-stack engineer with strong polyglot background (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) and solid software craftsmanship practices, but the role specifically requires deep JVM expertise and significant Spring ecosystem experience. Java appears only briefly (robotic arms work at Altom, mobile orchestration tool) with no Kotlin, no Spring/Quarkus/Hibernate, and no demonstrated IDE-internals or language-tooling work beyond a brief C/C++ stint on LabWindows/CVI a decade ago. The mismatch on the core required qualifications is substantial.
strengths: Long track record on complex, large-scale systems with craftsmanship focus (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based)
Prior IDE/developer-tooling exposure via LabWindows/CVI at National Instruments
Strong communication evidenced by workshops, talks, and teaching
concerns: No Spring, Quarkus, or Hibernate experience listed
No Kotlin experience and only peripheral, dated Java work
No recent JVM-internals, language-tooling, or IDE-platform work

key_factors.factor: No Kotlin and minimal Java depth
Strong senior-level engineering and craftsmanship track record
